name: C.Uyemura & Co.,Ltd.
summary: C.Uyemura & Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of plating chemicals, industrial chemicals, non-ferrous metals, and other products in Japan and internationally. The company operates in four segments: Surface Finishing Materials, Surface Finishing Machinery, Plating Job, and Real Estate Rental. It offers plating machinery for PWBs and aluminum magnetic disks; and plastic and PWB plating services. The company is also involved in the rental of office buildings and apartment houses. C.Uyemura & Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1848 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
